reference_images.label: slip_down_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Dungeon shaft palette, cold stone texture, vertical pressure mood, and obstacle rhythm anchor.

reference_images.label: slip_down_player
reference_images.purpose: Prisoner silhouette, fall pose, cloth volume, and shackle readability anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use one ImageBundle sheet for full-screen overlays and toggle sub-rect usage according to the active overlay state.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load ui/ui_pause_and_result_panels_320x180.png through AssetServer and display it on a centered overlay node when pause, fail, or clear states activate.
runtime_notes: Panel sheet aligns to the 320x180 internal canvas and scales uniformly to the 1280x720 presentation.
Overlay capture hides the friction gauge while preserving timer and record text anchors.
Game-over and clear states reuse the same panel sheet to reduce style drift.

context.usage: Full-screen panel sheet for pause, game over, and clear states inside the 320x180 internal canvas.

shape.silhouette: Single panel sheet containing pause frame, game-over frame, and clear frame zones with centered title blocks and button callouts.

acceptance_criteria: Pause, game-over, and clear zones remain visually distinct through border color and title treatment.
Centered title block leaves at least 16 px of margin from the outer frame on all sides.
